# noAccessControl

**Type Property**

A flag that indicates imported private keys have no access object attached to them.

## Declaration

```swift
static var noAccessControl: SecKeyImportExportFlags { get }
```

## Discussion

In the absence of both this bit and the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemImportExportKeyParameters/accessRef] field in the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecItemImportExportKeyParameters] structure, imported private keys receive default access controls.
title: noAccessControl
